children.text: the dollar values estimated for the program acquisition unit cost, average procurement unit cost, and total life-cycle cost; and

children.label: A
children.text: the dollar values estimated for the program acquisition unit cost, average procurement unit cost, and total life-cycle cost; and

children.label: B
children.text: the planned dates for initial operational test and evaluation and initial operational capability.
A summary of any production, manufacturing, and fielding risks associated with the program.
An assessment of the sufficiency of the developmental test and evaluation completed, including the use of automated data analytics or modeling and simulation tools and methodologies.

children.heading: .—Additional Information
children.label: b .—Additional Information
children.text: At the request of any of the congressional defense committees or, in the case of intelligence or intelligence-related activities, the congressional intelligence committees, the milestone decision authority shall submit to the committee further information or underlying documentation for the information in a brief summary report submitted under subsection (a), including the independent cost and schedule estimates and the independent technical risk assessments referred to in that subsection.

children.heading: .—Congressional Intelligence Committees Defined
children.label: c .—Congressional Intelligence Committees Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “congressional intelligence committees” has the meaning given that term in .section 437(c) of this title
